title: Quota display does not match occupancy records after device switch
current_question: After a device switch, the quota page still shows the prior device occupancy and the available slot count looks inconsistent.
critical_paths: Compare occupancy list with current device records
Verify available slot count matches occupancy truth
acceptance_criteria: Quota total, used, and available values match reconstructed occupancy truth.
No stale occupancy record remains in the validated scenario.
